title: Feature request: cross-board templates for automations
excerpt: It would be great to be able to access the custom automations across all boards instead of just being avaliable on one board. This would allow for custom automations to be used on similar boards in the workspace.

posts.author: ASuriyakumaran (Angela Suriyakumaran)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to access the custom automations across all boards instead of just being avaliable on one board. This would allow for custom automations to be used on similar boards in the workspace.
